description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a sleek, contoured double-cutaway design, finished in a glossy black color. The body features three control knobs and a set of pickups, likely for volume and tone adjustment, as well as a standard output jack. The neck is a light wood, possibly maple, with a bolt-on construction and a visible truss rod cover at the headstock. The headstock is angled and fitted with six inline tuning pegs, typical of many modern electric guitars. The fretboard appears to be a darker wood, possibly rosewood or ebony, and is fitted with standard metal frets. The overall design is ergonomic, making it suitable for both standing and seated play in urban environments such as street performances or music venues.
description: A glossy black, double-cutaway electric guitar with a light wood neck, three control knobs, and six inline tuning pegs. The design is modern and ergonomic, suitable for urban music settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the contoured black body and the full length of the light wood neck.
description_view_1: Edge-on view highlighting the guitar's slim profile and the alignment of the neck and body.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the black body, three control knobs, pickups, and the full fretboard.
description_view_3: Rear edge view showing the back of the neck and body, with tuning pegs partially visible.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled headstock with six inline tuning pegs, no visible logo, standard modern contour
